summary: Completed comprehensive testing of AdsPower automation dashboard. All backend APIs working correctly, frontend UI fully functional with successful integration testing.

design_issues.issue: React hydration warnings in console for HTML structure
design_issues.symptoms: Console warnings about span elements inside tbody and select elements
design_issues.impact: No functional impact, only console warnings

passed_tests: All 9 backend API endpoints working (100% success)
Dashboard loads with correct title and tabs
Tab navigation (Profiles, Comments, Run History) functional
Add Profile modal opens with all required fields
Profile creation, display, and deletion working
Comments tab displays 1000+ comments from Google Sheets
Sheet selection buttons working (Bump Connect, Bump Syndicate, Kollabsy)
Download Script button triggers file download successfully
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (9/9 tests passed), Frontend: 95% (minor console warnings only)
action_item_for_main_agent: Optional: Fix React hydration warnings by ensuring proper HTML structure in Comments table and Add Profile modal select dropdown. These are low priority cosmetic issues that don't affect functionality.
